questions: How does ads.txt reduce domain spoofing?
qa.answer: ads.txt (and app‑ads.txt) are publisher‑hosted files that list authorized sellers of their inventory, allowing buyers to verify legitimacy and reduce domain/app spoofing.
implication: Publish and keep ads.txt/app‑ads.txt updated across all properties.
Audit SSP entries; remove unauthorized or duplicate seller IDs.
Enforce buying rules to prefer authorized direct/reseller paths only.
